name: Ehukai Beach (Banzai Pipeline)
tagline: Pipeline is the most famous wave on Earth — watching from the sand puts you closer to the action than any surf comp broadcast.
parking: Tiny lot at Ehukai Beach Park or street parking on Ke Nui Rd; come early in winter
bestTime: Dec–Feb for massive Pipeline surf; summer is calm enough for swimming
talkStory: In winter you can sit on the sand and feel the ground shake when the big sets break — it's that close. Pipeline breaks over a shallow reef, so this is watch-only for 99% of people. During the Pipe Masters in December, the beach is packed but the energy is unreal. In summer, the same spot becomes a mellow beach. The access path is between houses off Ke Nui Rd — look for the blue sign.
